title: Iran women's national ice hockey team
summary: The Iran women's national ice hockey team (Persian: تیم ملی هاکی روی یخ بانوان ایران) is the national women's ice hockey team of Iran.
text:
The Iran women's national ice hockey team (Persian: تیم ملی هاکی روی یخ بانوان ایران) is the national women's ice hockey team of Iran.

History
The team began practicing in 2019 at the Iran Mall and played its first game in December 2021. The team competed in its first International Ice Hockey Federation championship in 2023.

Tournament record

2021 Dubai Cup
2023 Kazan Cup
2023 IIHF Women's Asia and Oceania Championship
2023 Al Ain Cup (As Ice Box with young players)
